definitions.text: The total, aggregate or sum of material .
examples: The amount of atmospheric pollution threatens a health crisis.
Pour a small amount of water into the dish.
The dogs need different amounts of food.

definitions.text: The number (the sum) of elements in a set.

examples: The money in my pocket amounts to three dollars and change.

definitions.text: To be the tantamount to; to reach up to the level of.
examples: He was a pretty good student, but never amounted to much professionally.
His response amounted to gross insubordination.
